name: Rice Pudding C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose a baking dish that will fit inside your crockpot.
2. Mix all ingredients except cinnamon in the baking dish.
3. Sprinkle cinnamon on top.
4. Cover the dish with foil.
5. Place a metal trivet or rack in the bottom of the crockpot.
6. Add 1 cup hot water to the pot.
7. Set the covered dish in the water in the crockpot.
8. Cover the crockpot and cook on high for 2 hours.
9. Makes 6-8 servings.
